lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there, what's this all about?

lines.speaker: Saradominist recruiter
lines.text: Our Lord Saradomin needs your help!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh great, what is it this time?

lines.speaker: Saradominist recruiter
lines.text: You're needed at Castle Wars, our forces are weakening and we need you as reinforcements.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, I'll play some Castle Wars.

lines.speaker: Saradominist recruiter
lines.text: Praise Saradomin, I'll send you there right away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, I'm alright actually, I don't want to play Castle Wars right now.

lines.speaker: Saradominist recruiter
lines.text: I urge you to reconsider, before it's too late.

sections.title: On seasonal or permanent Deadman Mode worlds

lines.speaker: Saradominist recruiter
lines.text: Fight for the greater good today!

lines.speaker: Saradominist recruiter
lines.text: The light of Saradomin is fading, he needs your help!

lines.speaker: Saradominist recruiter
lines.text: Zamorak is a false god who is a stain on this world, Saradomin will guide you forward.
